topic: A person making a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
raw_generation: {"script":"Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Side view of a lone person at a kitchen counter; hand twists peanut butter jar lid off.\nScene 2 — Building (2-5s): Overhead/top-down: spread peanut butter on one bread slice; then spread jelly on another slice.\nScene 3 — Finish (5-8s): Close-up/tilt: bring slices together, press, and place sandwich on plate.","narration":"From jar to bite, the sequence distills the quick, satisfying routine of making a classic peanut butter and jelly sandwich. Tight camera keeps focus on hands and ingredients, revealing the care in spreading and assembling. The final plate-ready sandwich offers a simple moment of reward in everyday cooking."}

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Side view of a lone person at a kitchen counter; hand twists peanut butter jar lid off.
Scene 2 — Building (2-5s): Overhead/top-down: spread peanut butter on one bread slice; then spread jelly on another slice.
Scene 3 — Finish (5-8s): Close-up/tilt: bring slices together, press, and place sandwich on plate.
parsed_generation.narration: From jar to bite, the sequence distills the quick, satisfying routine of making a classic peanut butter and jelly sandwich. Tight camera keeps focus on hands and ingredients, revealing the care in spreading and assembling. The final plate-ready sandwich offers a simple moment of reward in everyday cooking.

feedback: The prompt stays on topic and uses clear action-oriented scenes with shot descriptors. Consider making the scene prompts more uniform (e.g., always specify a single action per shot) and ensure narration complements visuals without duplicating what’s obvious.

fixes: Adopt a more concise, reference-style formatting (one clear line per task/scene) to enhance consistency.
